{{CargoOrgan
|name=Immortal Branches
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10652
|idx=9
|description=Rooted in eternal wisdom, these gnarled twigs whisper secrets of millennia. Nature's stubborn middle finger to death.
|skill=Summon Tree Branches, dealing DMG equal
to 154% of ATK!
|hp=1558
|def=114
|atk=77
|rush=71
|gene1=During exploration, Water DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +2%
|gene3=In explorations, food consumed -2%
|gene7=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +2% (Awakened)
|}}
